page_content:
ARCH449 Independent Studies in Visual Studies in Architecture (1-4 Credits)

Proposed work must have a faculty sponsor and receive approval of the Architecture Program Curriculum Committee.

Restriction: Permission of ARCH-Architecture Program; and must be ina major in ARCH-Architecture Program.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

ARCH456 Great Cities (3 Credits) Case studies from a selection of the great cities of the world. Prerequisite: Permission of ARCH-Architecture Program.
